title: Excalibur | ReArm Support
description: This resource pack redraws the ReArm mod in the Excalibur style
body:
This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [It Takes a Pillage](https://modrinth.com/mod/rearm) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Credits:**
- Maffhew – Creator of Excalibur
- Pajic - Creator of ReArm
